Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Vasha]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 1''' — Vasha is a Dragon's Fang sword that is approximately five feet long from pommel to tip.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 1''' — Vasha's surface is dull, pitted, and its blade is chipped.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 1''' — The steel of Vasha is now all but indestructible.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 3''' — Vasha flashed against the Incarnation's bar of dark ice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Indirial summoned Vasha.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — Vasha possesses a cracked blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — Vasha is a weapon that shimmers like an illusion and has phantom chains crawling across the user's flesh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — Vasha fell from Zakareth's numb hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 19''' — Vasha is something Indirial can summon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 20''' — Vasha is a blade summoned by Indirial.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 20''' — Vasha is a weapon used by Indirial that can bite through ordinary steel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — Vasha is missing from the entry hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — Vasha is one of the six people/things Indirial is counting.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — Indirial has Vasha at his side.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — Vasha possesses a cracked blade used in combat against Kai.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
